description: Daily poll at 02:00 UTC (Tier P2 — Governance / 4 streams). Pulls RBAC + asset governance: RBAC device groups, Unified RBAC roles, asset rules, sensitivity-aware classification (SAClassification). Writes to MDE_RbacDeviceGroups_CL, MDE_UnifiedRbacRoles_CL, MDE_AssetRules_CL, MDE_SAClassification_CL. Tier P2 = governance baseline (low-frequency).
